run_metadata.coverage_summary: Daily incremental discovery run. Tier 1 (federal + state/territory) portals surveyed via web search across AusTender, buy.nsw, Buying for Victoria, QTenders, Tenders WA, Tenders SA, Tenders Tasmania, QTOL and Tenders ACT; Tier 2 (local government via VendorPanel, GBE water corporations) and Tier 3 (SAP Ariba Discovery, BHP, Melbourne Water) sampled. IMPORTANT COVERAGE LIMITATION: this run executed under a restrictive network egress policy that blocked direct HTTPS access to every tender portal (all *.gov.au, buy.nsw, vendorpanel, ariba, etc. returned proxy 403 CONNECT denials; only github.com was reachable). Detail pages and tender documents therefore could NOT be opened directly. All opportunities below were surfaced through indexed web-search results (real detail-page URLs with consistent titles); headline identity fields are corroborated but closing dates/times, values, deliverables and contacts were not verifiable against the primary notice and must be confirmed on the buyer portal. Every captured tender is consequently flagged as pending a detail pass.
gaps: Network egress policy blocked ALL direct portal fetches (WebFetch and curl returned proxy '403 to CONNECT' for www.tenders.gov.au, buy.nsw.gov.au, tenders.nsw.gov.au, tenders.vic.gov.au, qtenders.epw.qld.gov.au, tenders.wa.gov.au, tenders.sa.gov.au, tenders.tas.gov.au, tendersonline.nt.gov.au, tenders.act.gov.au and vendorpanel.com.au). Only github.com/raw.githubusercontent.com were reachable. Discovery therefore relied entirely on web-search snippets; no primary detail page or tender document could be read.

AusTender (tenders.gov.au) ATM list and all /Atm/Show detail pages unreachable for direct extraction; individual ATM IDs (e.g. ATM_2026_6551 energy pipeline data - already closed 8-Jun-2026) seen only via search index.

SAP Ariba Discovery / SAP Business Network Discovery: no Australian open RFx publicly visible without a supplier login; the posting board itself was not reachable. No corporate opportunity captured as a tender this run (recorded as portals only). No invitation-only consultancy RFPs are discoverable by design - out of scope.

Tier 3 corporate portals (BHP interested-supplier register, Melbourne Water Zycus) are registration-gated; recorded as discovered_sources with access_method=portal-registration, individual opportunities not captured.
Melbourne Water Cardinia Dam Upgrade (CDU) RFP excluded: its published closing date (27-Mar-2026) is already past, so it is not a current opportunity.

Closing dates/times, values, deliverables, eligibility and contacts for all captured tenders are UNVERIFIED against the primary notice due to the egress block; they need confirmation on the buyer portal before downstream reliance.

Tier 2 local government (VendorPanel public tenders) and universities/health only sampled at portal level this run; individual council/university opportunities deferred to a future run when portal access is available.
recommended_seed_additions: QTenders new domain qtenders.epw.qld.gov.au (migrated from hpw.qld.gov.au) plus eTender QLD etender.hpw.qld.gov.au
Sydney Olympic Park Authority own tenders & EOI page (sydneyolympicpark.nsw.gov.au/development/planning-and-building/tenders-and-eoi)
BHP Interested Supplier Register (interestedsupplier.bhp.com) as the entry channel feeding SAP Ariba / GCMS
Melbourne Water Zycus e-sourcing portal (sourcing events lodged via Zycus) as the GBE's actual submission platform
Public Transport Authority of WA tenders page (pta.wa.gov.au/about-us/supplying-to-the-pta/tenders)

tenders.title: Maintenance of Public Area Lighting - Sydney Olympic Park precinct
tenders.description: Request for tender for maintenance of public area lighting across the Sydney Olympic Park (SOPA) precinct, including street lighting, carpark lighting, parks lighting and precinct feature lighting.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Supplier to provide ongoing maintenance of the SOPA precinct's public-area lighting assets (street, carpark, parks and feature lighting). Full scope not verified against the primary notice due to portal access being blocked this run.
tenders.submission_method: Lodge online via buy.nsw / NSW eTendering
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced via web search of buy.nsw open opportunities; buyer-originated listing on the NSW Government eTendering platform (Sydney Olympic Park Authority).
tenders.notes: Headline captured from search index; closing date/time and all detail fields UNVERIFIED because buy.nsw detail pages were unreachable under this run's egress policy. Confirm on buy.nsw before relying.

tenders.title: Community Housing Provider (CHP) Partnership Opportunity - HAFF Round 3
tenders.buyer: Homes NSW (Department of Communities and Justice)
tenders.description: Request for proposal inviting registered Community Housing Providers to partner with Homes NSW to deliver social and affordable housing under Housing Australia Future Fund (HAFF) Round 3.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Partnership proposals from Community Housing Providers to develop and/or deliver social and affordable dwellings under the HAFF Round 3 program. Detailed scope not verified against the primary notice due to portal access being blocked this run.
key_deliverables: Delivery of new social and affordable housing dwellings
CHP partnership arrangement with Homes NSW under HAFF Round 3
tenders.eligibility: Registered Community Housing Providers (eligibility to be confirmed against the notice)
tenders.submission_method: Lodge online via buy.nsw / NSW eTendering
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced via web search; buyer-originated RFP on buy.nsw plus corroborating Homes NSW / nsw.gov.au CHP Partnership Opportunity page (HAFF Round 3).
tenders.notes: Search results referenced a 'Camden' variant with differing closing dates (17-Jul vs 22-Jul-2026); these could not be reconciled against the primary notice under this run's egress block, so closing date left null. Confirm scope, reference and dates on buy.nsw.

tenders.title: Bombah Point Depot - Office and Amenity Hire (PROC10013)
tenders.buyer: Department of Climate Change, Energy, the Environment and Water (NSW)
tenders.category: Building and property / Temporary facilities hire
tenders.description: Notice/quotation for hire of office and amenity facilities at the Bombah Point Depot (Myall Lakes / NSW national parks estate).
tenders.deliverables_summary: Provision (hire) of office and amenity buildings/facilities at the Bombah Point Depot. Exact scope and term not verified against the primary notice due to portal access being blocked this run.
key_deliverables: Supply/hire of office facilities at Bombah Point Depot
Supply/hire of amenity facilities at Bombah Point Depot
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced via web search; buyer-originated notice on buy.nsw (title 'Office and Amenity Hire - PROC10013'). Note: one search snippet described a 'custom-designed office building construction' variant; the buy.nsw notice title indicates office/amenity HIRE - treat construction framing as unverified.
tenders.notes: Headline captured from search index; procurement_type inferred as RFQ from 'hire' notice title and NOT confirmed. Closing date and all detail fields UNVERIFIED due to egress block. Confirm on buy.nsw.

tenders.title: Transport for NSW - Professional Services (excl Consultancies)
tenders.description: Request for tender for professional services (excluding consultancies) for Transport for NSW. Industry is notified to complete a Confidentiality Deed Poll to obtain access to the RFT documents.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Professional services to be delivered to Transport for NSW; detailed scope is behind a Confidentiality Deed Poll and was not accessible this run.
requirements: Completion of a Confidentiality Deed Poll to receive access to the RFT documents
tenders.submission_method: Lodge online via buy.nsw / NSW eTendering after executing Confidentiality Deed Poll
mandatory_conditions: Confidentiality Deed Poll required to access tender documents
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced via web search of buy.nsw open opportunities; buyer-originated RFT from Transport for NSW with reference 26.0000139291.0409.
tenders.notes: RFT documents gated behind a Confidentiality Deed Poll; access set to free-registration. Closing date/time and scope UNVERIFIED against primary notice due to egress block.

tenders.title: Support, hosting and maintenance services for an Electronic Disease Surveillance System
tenders.buyer: Tasmanian Government (Department of Health, Tasmania - to confirm)
tenders.description: Tender seeking the provision of support, hosting and maintenance services for an Electronic Disease Surveillance System (EDSS) product.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Supplier to provide ongoing support, hosting and maintenance for an Electronic Disease Surveillance System product used by the Tasmanian Government. Detailed scope not verified against the primary notice due to portal access being blocked this run.
key_deliverables: Support services for the EDSS product
Hosting services for the EDSS product
Maintenance services for the EDSS product
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced via web search of Tenders Tasmania; buyer-originated Tasmanian Government tender. Buying agency (likely Department of Health) inferred from subject matter and not confirmed.
tenders.notes: Headline captured from search index; tender_id, buyer and closing date UNVERIFIED against the primary notice due to egress block. Confirm on tenders.tas.gov.au.

discovered_sources.source_name: QTenders (Queensland Government Tenders Directory) - new domain
discovered_sources.how_discovered: Web search returned the Queensland Government Tenders Directory on the domain qtenders.epw.qld.gov.au (Dept of Energy and Public Works), a change from the previously-known qtenders.hpw.qld.gov.au. Companion current-tender listing at etender.hpw.qld.gov.au also observed.
discovered_sources.notes: URL/branding change to record: QTenders now served from qtenders.epw.qld.gov.au. Migration to VendorPanel (via supply.qld.gov.au) is ongoing; check both. Not directly fetchable this run (egress 403).

discovered_sources.source_name: Sydney Olympic Park Authority - Tenders & EOI
discovered_sources.how_discovered: Found while investigating the SOPA public-area-lighting RFT; the Authority maintains its own Tenders & EOI page in addition to publishing on buy.nsw.
discovered_sources.notes: GBE-style precinct authority; opportunities also mirror onto buy.nsw. Not directly fetchable this run (egress 403).

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Tier 3 corporate sweep; BHP's dedicated Interested Supplier Register is the entry channel that onboards suppliers into SAP Business Network (Ariba) and the Global Contract Management System (GCMS).
discovered_sources.notes: Registration-gated (free SAP Ariba Standard Account). Individual RFx are invitation/login only; recorded as a portal, no opportunity captured. Complements the already-known 'BHP - Find opportunities' source.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: While reviewing the Cardinia Dam Upgrade EOI/RFP, found that Melbourne Water runs its sourcing events through the Zycus platform (submissions lodged via Zycus sourcing event numbers), a distinct e-sourcing platform not previously catalogued for this GBE.
discovered_sources.notes: Platform detail (Zycus) is the new finding; a Melbourne Water supplier/tender channel was already known. Registration-gated. Not directly fetchable this run (egress 403).

discovered_sources.source_name: Public Transport Authority of Western Australia - Tenders
discovered_sources.how_discovered: Tier 1/2 WA sweep surfaced the PTA WA supplying-to-the-PTA tenders page as a buyer-originated channel alongside Tenders WA.
discovered_sources.notes: State transport authority publishing its own tender notices. Not directly fetchable this run (egress 403).
